calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial.
Dept. 514; Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.

Frank Kim, Esq., appearing on behalf of Plaintiff EcoBuilding America LLC.
No appearance by Defendant Daniel Jorge aka Jorge Daniel Figuero.
Witness Serghei Surdu sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 570 O'Farrell Street, #115, San Francisco, California, 94102.
Damages $1875.00
Holdover damages $1798.00
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
For a Total Judgment of $3,673.00
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff EcoBuilding America LLC is present. Represented by Seghei Surdu.
Attorney Frank H. Kim for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jorge Figuero is NOT present.

***Plaintiff's representative and Counsel released at 2:09pm.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of June 5, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
